name: qr-text-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for generating QR code data, encoding URLs, and creating vCard/WiFi/email QR payloads. Returns text-based QR representations.

tools.name: generate_qr_payload
tools.description: Generate a QR code payload for various data types — URL, WiFi, vCard, email, phone, SMS, geo location.

tools.name: ascii_qr
tools.description: Generate a simple ASCII art QR-like representation of text data. Good for terminal display.
